rows.notes: Visual verification confirmed 'Arrearagia continued' from gemini-flash matches the image exactly for the header text. All extractors correctly identified it as a header with no amounts and provided high confidence.

Visual verification confirmed 'Alixe d Rents, variable' from gemini-flash matches the image precisely. The 'd' is a shorthand, and 'Alixe' has an ornate 'A'. All correctly identified as a header with no amounts.

Visual verification confirmed the description as 'Long. Wittenham Rectory' (gpt-5-mini's 'Wittenham' was more accurate than 'Willenham'). Amounts £172 7s 11½d are clearly visible, with a very clear halfpenny fraction. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values and fraction.

Visual verification confirmed description as 'South. Kewington D^o' (combining gpt-5-mini's 'South' with the superscript 'o'). Pounds 255 is clear. Shillings and pence columns are visibly blank, so represented as empty strings. gpt-5-mini's representation of empty values is preferred.

Visual verification confirmed description as 'Merton Do' (gemini-flash matched image). Pounds 15 is clear. Shillings and pence columns are visibly blank, so represented as empty strings. gemini-flash accurately captured both description and empty values.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Yardington Do. & Tent' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £65 19s 1½d. The fraction '½' is clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured these details.
Visual verification confirmed description 'Chase. Hill' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £19 7s 2d. The '2' in pence is clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini provided accurate amount readings.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Kiddington Mills' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £28 6s 10d. The '10' in pence is clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Garrington, Sadler Three Years' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £35 1s 11¾d. The '11' and '¾' fraction are distinct. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values and fraction.

All extractors agreed on the monetary values £14 2s 5½d, including the clear halfpenny fraction. Visual verification was used to accurately represent the description as '— Do Prickett', reflecting the ditto mark with a dash.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Tintinhull, Napier, Three Years' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £29 6s 1d. The pence value '1' is clearly visible. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values.

Visual verification confirmed description '— Do Beaton, Six Years' (combining gpt-5-mini's dash for the ditto mark with gemini-flash's accurate text). Amounts £8 10s 1d are clearly visible. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values.
Visual verification confirmed description 'Clifton Terry' and amounts £12 19s 11½d. The '11' and '½' fraction are very clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini provided accurate and consistent readings.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Bensington'. Amounts £11 2s. In the pence column, a clear dash is present followed by a '¼' fraction. Interpreted as no whole pence, only the fraction. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini correctly identified the fraction and gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku the description. The 'dash' interpretation for whole pence by gemini-flash is preferred.

Visual verification confirmed description 'So. Kewington Tent' (gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini matched) and amounts £4 5s 1¾d. The whole pence '1' and fraction '¾' are very clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini provided accurate readings for both description and monetary values.
Visual verification confirmed description 'Little Few Rents' (gemini-flash and claude-haiku matched). The word is clearly 'Few'. All extractors identified it as a header with no amounts.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Taylor, two Years' (gemini-flash matched) and amounts £22 5s 2½d. The whole pence '2' and fraction '½' are clear. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini provided accurate readings for monetary values, with gemini-flash being precise on description formatting.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Judge — Do' (adding the dash for the ditto mark and uppercase 'Do' to gpt-5-mini's 'Judge'). Amounts £10 18s 9½d are clearly visible, with a clear halfpenny fraction. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured the monetary values and fraction.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Hirons — Do' (using gpt-5-mini's 'Hirons' and adding the ditto dash and uppercase 'Do'). Amounts £10 5s 11½d are clearly visible, with a clear halfpenny fraction. gpt-5-mini provided the most accurate reading for description and monetary values.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Gardiner, Burdon's Do' (gemini-flash matched). Amounts £17 1s. The pence column clearly contains a dash, indicating no whole pence. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini correctly observed the dash, and gemini-flash captured the description precisely.

Visual verification confirmed description 'Hartley, Do' (gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku matched) and amounts £2 18s 6¼d. The whole pence '6' and fraction '¼' are clearly visible. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini accurately captured these monetary values and fraction, with gpt-5-mini providing the more accurate description.
